title: Monday Music Mix #36

Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

legacy.originalTitle: Thirtysixth Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally...
legacy.descriptionHtml:
Thirtysixth

Also known as the Tuesday music mix. One week and one day later than originally should’ve been out in the wild. Some new, some old and reimagined.

Contains some of the best music I have heard in a quite a192 while.

Monday Music Mix: 36

Album art featuring work by Erik Jones

Tracklist:

  1. The Kite String Tangle - Tennis Court (Lorde cover)
  2. Say Lou Lou - Beloved
  3. Empress Of - Realize You
  4. Dum Dum Girls - Lost Boys and Girls Club
  5. Bastille - (I Just) Died In Your Arms Tonight (Cutting Crew cover)
  6. Blood Orange - You’re Not Good Enough
  7. Twin Shadow - Old Love New Love
  8. STRANGERS - London Light
  9. Grizzly Bear - Will Calls
  10. Mogwai - Remurdered
  11. High Highs - A Real Hero (College & Electric Youth cover)
  12. Angel Haze - Summer Time Sadness (Lana Del Rey cover)
  13. Ellie Goulding - Mirror
  14. Oh Land - Love You Better (John Dillinger remix)

* Tracks in bold indicate my favourites

Download album
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in bold indicate my favourites
